sentences.text: Christmas is celebrated on the twenty-fifth of December in many countries around the world.
sentences.translation_vi: Giang sinh duoc to chuc vao ngay hai muoi lam thang muoi hai o nhieu quoc gia tren the gioi.

sentences.text: During the Lunar New Year, families gather together to share traditional meals and exchange red envelopes.
sentences.translation_vi: Trong dip Tet Nguyen Dan, gia dinh tu hop lai de chia se bua an truyen thong va trao doi bao li xi.

sentences.text: Halloween, which originated in Ireland, has become one of the most popular holidays in America.
sentences.translation_vi: Le Halloween, bat nguon tu Ai Len, da tro thanh mot trong nhung ngay le pho bien nhat o My.

sentences.text: If you visit Brazil during Carnival, you will see colorful parades and hear amazing music everywhere.
sentences.translation_vi: Neu ban den Brazil trong le hoi Carnival, ban se thay nhung doan dieu hanh sac mau va nghe nhac tuyet voi khap noi.

sentences.text: The Mid-Autumn Festival is a time when people enjoy mooncakes and admire the full moon.
sentences.translation_vi: Tet Trung Thu la thoi diem moi nguoi thuong thuc banh trung thu va ngam trang tron.

sentences.text: It is said that Thanksgiving was first celebrated by the Pilgrims in sixteen twenty-one.
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi ta noi rang Le Ta On lan dau duoc to chuc boi nhung nguoi Pilgrim vao nam mot nghin sau tram hai muoi mot.

sentences.text: Many people decorate their homes with lights and ornaments when the holiday season begins.
sentences.translation_vi: Nhieu nguoi trang tri nha cua bang den va do trang tri khi mua le bat dau.

sentences.text: Easter eggs are hidden in gardens so that children can have fun searching for them.
sentences.translation_vi: Trung Phuc Sinh duoc giau trong vuon de tre em co the vui ve tim kiem chung.

sentences.text: Although Diwali is a Hindu festival, it is now celebrated by people of many different religions.
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du Diwali la mot le hoi cua dao Hindu, nhung bay gio no duoc to chuc boi nguoi cua nhieu ton giao khac nhau.

sentences.text: On New Year's Eve, people stay up until midnight to watch fireworks and welcome the coming year.
sentences.translation_vi: Vao dem Giao Thua, moi nguoi thuc den nua dem de xem phao hoa va chao don nam moi.

sentences.text: The Day of the Dead, which is celebrated in Mexico, honors the memory of loved ones who have passed away.
sentences.translation_vi: Ngay cua Nguoi Chet, duoc to chuc o Mexico, ton vinh ky uc ve nhung nguoi than yeu da qua doi.

sentences.text: My friend told me that the Holi festival in India involves throwing colored powder at each other.
sentences.translation_vi: Ban toi noi voi toi rang le hoi Holi o An Do bao gom viec nem bot mau vao nhau.

sentences.text: Public holidays vary from country to country, and some nations have more than twenty official holidays per year.
sentences.translation_vi: Ngay le cong cong thay doi tuy theo tung quoc gia, va mot so nuoc co hon hai muoi ngay le chinh thuc moi nam.

sentences.text: Valentine's Day is a holiday when couples exchange gifts, but not everyone agrees with its commercialization.
sentences.translation_vi: Ngay Le Tinh Nhan la ngay le khi cac cap doi trao doi qua, nhung khong phai ai cung dong y voi viec thuong mai hoa no.

sentences.text: The local government announced that the annual lantern festival would be held in the main square this weekend.
sentences.translation_vi: Chinh quyen dia phuong thong bao rang le hoi den long hang nam se duoc to chuc tai quang truong chinh vao cuoi tuan nay.
